(a) Subjection of the Palestinian people, inside the occupied Palestinian territory, to the policy of the "iron fist";
(b) To mount acts of Israeli brutality since the beginning of the uprising (intifada) on 9 December 1987;
(c) Abuse and torture of detained or imprisoned children and children;
(d) Closure of the seats and offices of trade unions and social services, harassment, including expulsion, of their leaders and attacks on hospitals and hospital staff;

(g) From millicrs of civilians to broken limbs;
(h) Residence assignments, either at home or in a locality;
(i) Use of toxic gases, including the death of many Palestinians;

Requests the Security Council to ensure that Israel complies with and complies with all provisions of the Geneva Convention relative to the Protection of Civilian Persons in Time of War, of 12 August 1949, in the occupied Palestinian territory, including Jerusa› lem, and in other Arab territories occupied by Israel since 1967, and to take measures to put an end to Israeli policies and practices in those territories;

Urges the Security Council to review the current situation in the Palestinian territory occupied by Israel since 1967, taking into account the recommendations contained in the reports of the Secretary-General, with a view to ensuring international protection for the Palestinian people without defence until Is› rael, the occupying Power, withdraws from its territory;

16. Calls upon Israel, the occupying Power, to re-open the Jerusalem Roman Catholic Hospital Hospital, so that medical and health care services needed by the Palestinians in Ja City may continue to be provided;

17. Also calls upon Israel, the occupying Power, to take immediate steps to ensure that, pursuant to Security Council Resolution 237 (1967) of 14 June 1967, all Arabs and Palestinians returning to their homes or former places of residence in the territories occupied by Israel since 1967;

18. Urges international organizations, including specialized institutions, in particular the International Labour Organization, the United Nations Educational, Scientific and Cultural Organization and the World Health Organization, to continue to examine the situation, in the field of education and health, in the occupied Palestinian territory, including Jerusalem, and in the other Arab territories occupied by Israel since 1967;
